data.title: Traders see two fed rate cuts this year
data.description:
Bond traders are now fully pricing in two rate cuts by the Federal Reserve this year after fresh data on producer prices and weekly jobless claims gave US Treasury markets a lift. On Thursday, Treasury prices climbed sharply across nearly all parts of the curve, pushing yields down six to seven basis points. This marks […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/traders-see-two-fed-rate-cuts-this-year/

data.title: BlackRock Aims for Global Leadership in Crypto Asset Management
data.description:
BlackRock targets the top spot in crypto asset management by 2030, managing $50 billion in digital assets.
source: https://coincu.com/342937-blackrock-crypto-asset-management-2030

data.title: Crypto Lander Partners With Lido to Offer stETH-Backed Stablecoin Loans
data.description:
This collaboration offers institutions a way to unlock liquidity from their staked ETH positions without needing to unwind them.
source: https://coindoo.com/crypto-lander-partners-with-lido-to-offer-steth-backed-stablecoin-loans/

data.title: Fears over Iran-Israel war are driving oil prices lower
data.description:
Crude oil futures slipped on Thursday, easing back after a sharp rally in the previous session driven by concerns that Israel and Iran could be on the verge of open conflict. By 11:15 a. m. Eastern Time, US West Texas Intermediate futures were down 54 cents, or 0. 8%, settling at $67. 61 a barrel. At the same […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/iran-israel-war-fears-oil-lower/

data.title: Meta Could Launch Private Currency With GENIUS Act Loophole, Say Senators
data.description:
TL;DR Meta is reportedly preparing to revive its plans for a private stablecoin, taking advantage of a legal gap in the recently passed GENIUS Act. Critical senators argue that the move could centralize even more financial power within a single tech company. Still, Meta’s renewed interest in digital assets represents a major step toward broader. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/meta-could-launch-private-currency-with-genius-act-loophole-say-senators/

data.title: China plans to drop all tariffs on African imports for new markets as it settles with Trump
data.description:
China has announced that it will remove the tariffs it charges on imports from all 53 African countries with which it has formal ties. The decision was made at a China-Africa co-operation meeting. When it goes into effect, the move to zero tariffs will be an extension of China’s deal last year to drop taxes […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/china-to-drop-all-tariffs-on-african-imports/

data.title: World Liberty promised AAVE lending six months ago — so where is it?
data.description:
Donald Trump-affiliated World Liberty Financial has yet to launch its AAVE instance six months after the governance vote approving it.
source: https://protos.com/trump-world-liberty-aave-missing/

data.title: XRP Ledger adopts USDC one week after Circle goes public
data.description:
Circle's institutional stablecoin creation platform Circle Mint and developer-focused Circle API now support USDC on the XRPL, bolstering USDC's liquidity on the network.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/357946/xrp-ledger-adopts-usdc-one-week-after-circle-goes-public?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Binance’s BSC knocks Ethereum out of top spot in dApp volume rankings
data.description:
Binance's BNB Smart Chain is now the leading venue for decentralized apps, driven by the growth of PancakeSwap. Binance also grew its share of the centralized trading market, suggesting a bullish direction for crypto assets.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/binance-bsc-leads-ethereum-dapp-volume/

data.title: Curve DAO falls 9%, but long-term investors can save CRV – How?
data.description:
CRV drop intensifies, but long-term investments and liquidity inflows suggest potential recovery.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/curve-dao-falls-9-but-long-term-investors-can-save-crv-how/

data.title: Global Liquidity Hits Record—Bitcoin’s Next Move Could Shock Markets
data.description:
Since the breakout, GLI has climbed an additional 2%, aligning closely with Bitcoin’s recent Q2 rally.

data.title: US SEC Delays Approval of VanEck Avalanche ETF
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to market news: The U.S. SEC has delayed its decision on the approval of VanEck's spot Avalanche ETF.

data.title: BlackRock puts crypto assets at the core of its 2030 strategic vision
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News BlackRock announced that it has included "becoming the world's largest crypto asset manager" as one of its 2030 vision priorities. Currently, its crypto asset management scale exceeds US$50 billion, covering ETF products such as IBIT and ETHA, and manages Circle's USDC reserves and the US$200 million BUIDL tokenized fund. (BitcoinMagazine)

data.title: DeFi Development announced that it has received $5 billion in equity financing to increase its holdings of SOL
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Nasdaq-listed company DeFi Development Corp. posted on the X platform that it has obtained a $5 billion equity financing quota to support 1i's continued increase in SOL holdings and accelerate its "SOL per share" (SPS) growth.

data.title: Trump: Musk does like me
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Trump said that Musk really likes me. I like Tesla (TSLA.O) and other electric car companies. Legislation will remove mandatory regulations for electric vehicles, and the courts do not need to intervene. (Jinshi)

data.title: XRP ETF verdict looms: June 17 decision could trigger price surge amid institutional inflows
data.description:
12-6-2025 – A pivotal moment looms for XRP, the cryptocurrency that’s once again capturing the financial world’s attention. On 17 June, the United States’ financial regulator, the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), is poised to deliver a verdict on a proposed XRP Spot Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF). This decision could prove a watershed for the digital [.
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/xrp-etf-verdict-looms-june-17-decision-could-trigger-price-surge-amid-institutional-inflows/

data.title: US President Trump suggests the Federal Reserve cut interest rates by 200 basis points
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US President Trump suggested that the Federal Reserve cut interest rates by 200 basis points. Sources said the Trump administration is expected to announce a renewable fuel quota proposal this Friday. (Jinshi)

data.title: Michael Saylor: Strategy will take the lead in the BTC-backed fixed income market
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Michael Saylor posted on the X platform that Strategy will take the lead in the Bitcoin-backed fixed income market.

data.title: USDC Goes Live on XRPL Enabling Fast Stablecoin Transactions
data.description:
USDC is now available directly on the XRP Ledger, expanding access to fast, secure, stablecoin transactions without the need for bridges. Concurrently, USDC recently went live on World Chain.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/12/usdc-goes-live-on-xrpl-enabling-fast-stablecoin-transactions-heres-all/

data.title: Tony G Co-Investment purchased 10,387.685 HYPE tokens and plans to deploy HyperLiquid ecosystem
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Tony G Co-Investment Holdings Ltd., a Canadian listed company, announced that it has completed the acquisition of HYPE tokens, the native assets of the Hyperliquid ecosystem, with a total purchase of 10,387.685 HYPE tokens, an average purchase price of US$42.24 per token, and a total transaction amount of US$438,828.46. (Newsfilecorp)
